title: Muda Waste Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost of waste (Muda) in industrial processes based on Lean and Six Sigma principles, identifying hidden loss drivers and suggesting corrective actions.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit of product, including raw materials and purchased components.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average fully burdened labor cost per hour for direct operators.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

inputs.label: Rework Time per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent reworking a defective unit.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).

inputs.label: Waiting Time per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average idle time per unit due to bottlenecks, material shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt time analysis).

inputs.label: Excess Motion Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) per unit, based on time-motion studies.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of holding one unit in inventory per year (WERC DC Metrics).

inputs.label: Overproduction Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced beyond customer demand (Muda of overproduction).

inputs.label: Transportation Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of moving materials or products between processes (Lean waste of transportation).

inputs.label: Processing Waste per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of unnecessary processing steps or non-value-added operations.

inputs.label: Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the analysis period.

inputs.label: Shift Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of operating hours per shift.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of working days per year.

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Industry sector for benchmarking and threshold adjustment.

inputs.label: Include Hidden Losses
inputs.businessContext: If true, includes intangible losses such as lost opportunity cost and brand damage.

rules.message: Defect rate must be greater than or equal to scrap rate.
Overhead rate must be between 0% and 500%.
Production volume must be greater than zero.

thresholds.alert: Defect cost exceeds $50,000. Immediate Six Sigma DMAIC intervention recommended.
Waiting cost exceeds $20,000. Consider value stream mapping and Takt time adjustment.
Overproduction cost exceeds $100,000. Implement pull system (Kanban).
Data confidence is low. Verify input accuracy and consider data collection improvement.

formulas.label: Defect Cost
formulas.description: Total cost of defects including rework labor, material, and overhead.

formulas.label: Waiting Cost
formulas.description: Cost of idle time due to waiting (bottlenecks, shortages).

formulas.label: Overproduction Cost
formulas.description: Cost of producing beyond demand, including material, labor, and holding.

formulas.label: Motion, Transport & Processing Waste Cost
formulas.description: Aggregated cost of excess motion, transportation, and non-value-added processing.

formulas.label: Inventory Waste Cost
formulas.description: Cost of excess inventory holding (WIP and finished goods).

formulas.label: Hidden Losses
formulas.description: Intangible costs such as lost sales, brand damage, and opportunity cost (only if include_hidden_losses is true).

formulas.label: Total Waste Cost (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Sum of all identified waste costs, adjusted for data confidence.
formulas.formula: (defect_cost + waiting_cost + overproduction_cost + motion_transport_processing_cost + inventory_waste_cost + hidden_losses) * dataConfidenceAdjusted

primary.label: Total Waste Cost
primary.description: Annualized total cost of Muda (waste) in the process.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Lost Opportunity Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Revenue lost due to defects and delays (estimated as 10% of defect + waiting cost).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Brand Impact Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated cost of reputation damage from poor quality (5% of total waste).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Employee Morale Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of reduced productivity due to frustration from waste (3% of labor cost).

suggestedActions.action: Implement Statistical Process Control (SPC) and root cause analysis (5 Whys) to reduce defect rate.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces defect cost by up to 40%.

suggestedActions.action: Conduct value stream mapping to identify bottlenecks and implement Takt time balancing.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces waiting cost by up to 30%.

suggestedActions.action: Switch to a pull-based Kanban system and reduce batch sizes.
Redesign workstations using 5S and ergonomic principles to reduce excess motion.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces motion cost by up to 20%.

suggestedActions.action: Implement Just-In-Time (JIT) delivery and reduce safety stock levels.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces inventory holding cost by up to 25%.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Factor
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Adjusts total waste cost based on input data reliability (0.7 to 1.0). Calculated from completeness and consistency of inputs.
